1.name: Another's Burden
1.description: Take on the wound penalties of another
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 88-89

1.name: Mirror of the Gods
1.description: [2] : Enchant a mirror so that it reveals the use of blood sorcery
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 89

1.name: Mirror of the Gods [2]
1.description: Enchant a mirror so that it reveals the use of blood sorcery

2.name: Obsidian Shattered
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 88-89

2.name: Shroud of Day
2.description: [3] : Enchant a stake so that it puts a vampire to sleep as well as torpor
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 89

2.name: Shroud of Day [3]
2.description: Enchant a stake so that it puts a vampire to sleep as well as torpor

3.name: Brother's Eyes
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 89

3.name: Burden Another
3.description: Force your wound penalties upon another
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 88-89

4.name: Obsidian's Edge
4.description: Cause damage to another within eyesight
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 88-89

4.name: Strength of the Vanquished
4.description: [5] : Symbolically devour the organs of an opponent to gain their strength temporarily
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 89

4.name: Strength of the Vanquished [5]
4.description: Symbolically devour the organs of an opponent to gain their strength temporarily

5.name: Flay
5.description: As Obsidian's Edge , but against multiple targets
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 88-89

5.name: Severance
5.description: [6] : Remove the heart or other body part of an individual while keeping them alive
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 90

5.description: Remove the heart or other body part of an individual while keeping them alive
